description: Assembly plans, design specs, and technical drawings for the eyebot.  Most of this is useless to you, but you could use the assembly plans to re-assemble the robot from salvaged parts.
Assembly plans, design specs, and technical drawings for the police bot.  Most of this is useless to you, but you could use the assembly plans to re-assemble the robot from salvaged parts.
Assembly plans, design specs, and technical drawings for the miner bot.  Most of this is useless to you, but you could use the assembly plans to re-assemble the robot from salvaged parts.
Assembly plans, design specs, and technical drawings for the riot control bot.  Most of this is useless to you, but you could use the assembly plans to re-assemble the robot from salvaged parts.
